testsuite.name: agentforge.gateway.GatewayRoutesTest

testcase.name: cancelWorkflow with unknown ID returns false
getWorkflow with unknown ID returns empty
executeWorkflow runs and returns completed results
submitWorkflow returns accepted response with workflow ID

testsuite.system-out: 09:05:05.935 [Test worker] WARN agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow rejected: cyclic: Workflow DAG contains a cycle 09:05:05.937 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow submitted: ebc27032-7a95-4c47-87bf-992c204e2bc5 (status-wf) 09:05:05.937 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow submitted: c0ab7dc9-9e45-48e3-9cad-d798aaacfdb5 (cancel-wf) 09:05:05.938 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow cancelled: c0ab7dc9-9e45-48e3-9cad-d798aaacfdb5 09:05:05.938 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow submitted: c8912f78-96f3-492c-8081-af69107af2f4 (wf-1) 09:05:05.938 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow submitted: 8e0fc496-9209-47c4-9baf-3c00f63f69fd (wf-2) 09:05:05.941 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow submitted: 18eae75f-7bd2-4bee-af3e-b7fad2f6b419 (exec-wf) 09:05:05.942 [] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow completed: 18eae75f-7bd2-4bee-af3e-b7fad2f6b419 (2 tasks) 09:05:05.943 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.gateway.GatewayRouter -- Workflow submitted: d832a8dd-d88c-4e7a-a8f4-fdf0b18d00b1 (test-wf)
